security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Casual RAS host — share this screen over a peer-to-peer link.
bundle.longDescription: The shared-machine side of Casual RAS. Shows a connection ticket to hand to a viewer, asks for local Allow/Deny consent, then streams this screen over an encrypted peer-to-peer (Iroh/QUIC) link. macOS only in the alpha; view-only.
